subject: docs(data): add raw Overpass data and update session notes for next session
body:
Commits the raw Overpass API extract (4,215 SA fuel stations) so the next
session can pick up without re-fetching. Updated TODO with reverse geocoding
tasks for the 1,482 stations missing address/city data (blocked on
*.openstreetmap.org whitelist). Session notes capture current state.

Tags: data, osm, documentation, session-handoff
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: data-extraction
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_017p1nYkDcWwq15p9WAokeCx
title: add raw Overpass data and update session notes for next session
